TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == O tarawadaw no siwkulan == I kongpo ko pitekaan no siwkulan , i kiwit ko cepo' nira ta pasayra i riyar. nano kasopsopan no nanom no sa'owac, ta malasawa'eran no siwkulan hananay a tarawadaw o ka'edaw nira i 81 kilo masapikopiko ko karomakat no nanom. Nani timol ta pasa'amis ko 'alol nira, roma a nanom, kalidkid ko rakat. roma a nanom i masadafdaf ko lakelal ta malasasifo'ang ko sonol no likid no nanom. O malasasifo'ang no Yusan ato Taytung hananay a lotoklotokan ko siwkulan. I laloma' no tarawadaw i adihay ko kahirahira no futing i nanom. Orasaka, kaolahan no masapangcahay a mifuting i tira. Malosaka'orip no pangcah ko kinaira no tarawadaw a futing. Nai 79 miheca misatapang to pikihadoyan a tamina, 'aloman ko nanicowacowaay a tamdamdaw tayra misalama. I tini Taywan, o satata'angay pisalamaan to tamina i tira kayakay no kohkoh ko pisatapangan tangasa i Canghong a kayakay ko pitolasan. Sa'osi han ko raay Maedeng 4 ko widi tedong i Kiwi ta pahanhann,caay ka nikaw to nanom, manga'ay to a samihecaan saan a misalama.
S.PHON: == o~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw no~u siwko~u~uɾan == i ko~uŋpo~u ko~u pitəkaan no~u siwko~u~uɾan , i kiwit ko~u ʦəpo~uʡ nira ta pasajra i rijar. nano~u kaso~upso~upan no~u nano~um no~u saʡo~uwaʦ, ta maɾasawaʡəran no~u siwko~u~uɾan ħananaj a tarawaɬ~ɮaw o~u kaʡəɬ~ɮaw nira i ** kiɾo~u masapiko~upiko~u ko~u karo~umakat no~u nano~um. nani timo~uɾ ta pasaʡamis ko~u ʡaɾo~uɾ nira, ro~uma a nano~um, kaɾiɬ~ɮkiɬ~ɮ ko~u rakat. ro~uma a nano~um i masaɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf ko~u ɾakəɾaɾ ta maɾasasifo~uʡaŋ ko~u so~uno~uɾ no~u ɾikiɬ~ɮ no~u nano~um. o~u maɾasasifo~uʡaŋ no~u jo~u~usan ato~u tajto~u~uŋ ħananaj a ɾo~uto~ukɾo~uto~ukan ko~u siwko~u~uɾan. i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw i aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kaħiraħira no~u fo~u~utiŋ i nano~um. o~urasaka, kao~uɾaħan no~u masapaŋʦaħaj a mifo~u~utiŋ i tira. maɾo~usakaʡo~urip no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u kinaira no~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw a fo~u~utiŋ. nai ** miħəʦa misatapaŋ to~u pikiħaɬ~ɮo~ujan a tamina, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u naniʦo~uwaʦo~uwaaj a tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw tajra misaɾama. i tini tajwan, o~u satataʡaŋaj pisaɾamaan to~u tamina i tira kajakaj no~u ko~uħko~uħ ko~u pisatapaŋan taŋasa i ʦaŋħo~uŋ a kajakaj ko~u pito~uɾasan. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u raaj maəɬ~ɮəŋ * ko~u wiɬ~ɮi təɬ~ɮo~uŋ i kiwi ta paħanħann,ʦaaj ka nikaw to~u nano~um, maŋaʡaj to~u a samiħəʦaan saan a misaɾama.
S.FORM: == O tarawadaw no siwkulan == I kongpo ko pitekaan no siwkulan , i kiwit ko cepo' nira ta pasayra i riyar. nano kasopsopan no nanom no sa'owac, ta malasawa'eran no siwkulan hananay a tarawadaw o ka'edaw nira i 81 kilo masapikopiko ko karomakat no nanom. Nani timol ta pasa'amis ko 'alol nira, roma a nanom, kalidkid ko rakat. roma a nanom i masadafdaf ko lakelal ta malasasifo'ang ko sonol no likid no nanom. O malasasifo'ang no Yusan ato Taytung hananay a lotoklotokan ko siwkulan. I laloma' no tarawadaw i adihay ko kahirahira no futing i nanom. Orasaka, kaolahan no masapangcahay a mifuting i tira. Malosaka'orip no pangcah ko kinaira no tarawadaw a futing. Nai 79 miheca misatapang to pikihadoyan a tamina, 'aloman ko nanicowacowaay a tamdamdaw tayra misalama. I tini Taywan, o satata'angay pisalamaan to tamina i tira kayakay no kohkoh ko pisatapangan tangasa i Canghong a kayakay ko pitolasan. Sa'osi han ko raay Maedeng 4 ko widi tedong i Kiwi ta pahanhann,caay ka nikaw to nanom, manga'ay to a samihecaan saan a misalama.
S.PHON: == o~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw no~u siwko~u~uɾan == i ko~uŋpo~u ko~u pitəkaan no~u siwko~u~uɾan , i kiwit ko~u ʦəpo~uʡ nira ta pasajra i rijar. nano~u kaso~upso~upan no~u nano~um no~u saʡo~uwaʦ, ta maɾasawaʡəran no~u siwko~u~uɾan ħananaj a tarawaɬ~ɮaw o~u kaʡəɬ~ɮaw nira i ** kiɾo~u masapiko~upiko~u ko~u karo~umakat no~u nano~um. nani timo~uɾ ta pasaʡamis ko~u ʡaɾo~uɾ nira, ro~uma a nano~um, kaɾiɬ~ɮkiɬ~ɮ ko~u rakat. ro~uma a nano~um i masaɬ~ɮafɬ~ɮaf ko~u ɾakəɾaɾ ta maɾasasifo~uʡaŋ ko~u so~uno~uɾ no~u ɾikiɬ~ɮ no~u nano~um. o~u maɾasasifo~uʡaŋ no~u jo~u~usan ato~u tajto~u~uŋ ħananaj a ɾo~uto~ukɾo~uto~ukan ko~u siwko~u~uɾan. i ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw i aɬ~ɮiħaj ko~u kaħiraħira no~u fo~u~utiŋ i nano~um. o~urasaka, kao~uɾaħan no~u masapaŋʦaħaj a mifo~u~utiŋ i tira. maɾo~usakaʡo~urip no~u paŋʦaħ ko~u kinaira no~u tarawaɬ~ɮaw a fo~u~utiŋ. nai ** miħəʦa misatapaŋ to~u pikiħaɬ~ɮo~ujan a tamina, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u naniʦo~uwaʦo~uwaaj a tamɬ~ɮamɬ~ɮaw tajra misaɾama. i tini tajwan, o~u satataʡaŋaj pisaɾamaan to~u tamina i tira kajakaj no~u ko~uħko~uħ ko~u pisatapaŋan taŋasa i ʦaŋħo~uŋ a kajakaj ko~u pito~uɾasan. saʡo~usi ħan ko~u raaj maəɬ~ɮəŋ * ko~u wiɬ~ɮi təɬ~ɮo~uŋ i kiwi ta paħanħann,ʦaaj ka nikaw to~u nano~um, maŋaʡaj to~u a samiħəʦaan saan a misaɾama.
